scenarios.note: Reply mentions skills by name (skill__code_review, skill__skill_builder, skill__direct_llm etc.), agents, and chat capabilities inline. user_message_received emitted, no permission_denied. chat_turn_completed_inline path — no direct_llm artifact, but artifact not blocking for inline responses (B38 precedent). Same as B38 W1 S1 (V).

Reply correctly explains idempotency ('同じ操作を何度繰り返しても、同じ結果が得られる性質'). routing_decided emitted via web__search (hot_list_alias). no permission_denied. No direct_llm artifact (web__search path), but reply rubric passes. Same judgment as B38 W1 S2 (V).

Reply lists 16 skill names (PASS). routing_decided NOT emitted — used list_actions tool then inline reply (chat_turn_completed_inline). must_emit routing_decided not satisfied. Consistent with B37/B38 prediction (refuted=1.0) and B38 W1 S3 result (R). No change.

REGRESSION vs B38 W1 (was V). LLM chose skill__direct_llm instead of skill__word_stats_demo despite explicit instruction. Reply contains word count/character count (PASS). routing_decided emitted (skill__direct_llm via invoke_action), skill_run_spawned+completed (success). BUT word_stats_demo artifact ABSENT — direct_llm artifact present instead. Artifact check fails. B38 correctly routed to word_stats_demo; B39 routes to direct_llm.

Router asked for clarification ('どのようなテーマや雰囲気の詩がお好みですか？') instead of writing a poem. Reply rubric fails (no poem produced). Events pass: chat_turn_completed_inline emitted (satisfies must_emit_any). No permission_denied. Same as B38 W1 S5 (R). Consistent clarification-attractor for creative tasks.

REGRESSION vs B38 W1 (was V). Turn 1: correct inline explanation of list comprehension syntax. Turn 2: invoke_action(skill__direct_llm) spawned and ran successfully, producing code examples (squares, conditionals, nested). BUT the agent's final reply was a SUMMARY ('基本的な例、条件付きの例、ネストしたリスト内包表記のコード例が提示されました') without the actual code. Rubric: 'second reply contains a Python code example' — FAIL. task_completed narration collapsed skill output into description instead of surfacing code. routing_decided emitted, no permission_denied.

Router asked 'どの画像をご希望ですか？ 画像生成のための具体的な指示や説明をいただけますでしょうか' — soliciting image details instead of declining. Did NOT politely decline or explain image generation is unavailable. chat_turn_completed_inline emitted, no permission_denied. Same as B38 W1 S7 (R). B38-OBS-2 confirmed: image-generation non-decline is not a regression from B38 but rather a persistent attractor.

angle_1_ghost_rejection.log_evidence: [reyn] action_usage: skipping ghost alias 'skill__nonexistent_xyz' — not found in current registry
angle_1_ghost_rejection.note: First injection attempt used wrong format (action/calls/last_called/score fields) — correctly ignored. Second injection used correct format (qualified_name/ts). Ghost was loaded structurally but filtered by _filter_ghost_names_by_registry at hot-list materialization. Log message appeared in web.log (stderr captured via 2>&1). 0/N LLM requests contain skill__nonexistent_xyz in ARS or tool list.

angle_1b_empty_schema_not_misclassified.note: direct_llm and read_local_files appear in ARS for all LLM requests (see angle_2). They are NOT rejected by registry check. Empty-schema skills are correctly accepted — b1ca51a fix confirmed effective.

angle_2_empty_schema_skills_ars_visible.ars_excerpt: skill__direct_llm: {text}  skill__read_local_files: {text}  skill__index_docs: {description, mode, path, source}  skill__eval: {case_input, case_name, phase_criteria, skill_root, spec_path, target_skill_path}
angle_2_empty_schema_skills_ars_visible.note: Both newly-fixed empty-schema skills (direct_llm, read_local_files) appear in invoke_action's ACTION ARG SCHEMAS block with {text} schema in all checked requests. b4daeb1 fix (explicit input_schema for empty-schema skills) is structurally effective.

angle_3_state_mode_field.note: state_mode: 'fresh' included in this results.json per #122 requirement. dogfood_fresh_reset.sh was run before each scenario (confirmed by removal log messages). Per-scenario fresh-mode discipline: action_usage.jsonl and wal.jsonl removed before each run.

regressions.cause: LLM chose skill__direct_llm instead of skill__word_stats_demo for explicit invocation request
task_completed narration collapsed direct_llm code output into summary — no actual code in agent reply

stable_same: S3: R->R (routing_decided not emitted for skill discovery)
angle_4_delta_vs_b38.note: Net -2V vs B38. Two regressions: S4 skill routing (word_stats->direct_llm) and S6 task_completed narration collapse. Pre-conclusion checklist applied: both regressions are N=1 single-shot observations — not confirmed as structural patterns. Hypothesis for S4: ARS description growth may make direct_llm more salient than word_stats_demo for general text requests. Hypothesis for S6: spawn-path task_completed narration attractor (skill result summarized rather than surfaced).

new_findings.title: S4 routing regression: direct_llm preferred over word_stats_demo for explicit invocation
new_findings.description: S4 (word_stats_demo でこのテキストを解析して): B38 W1 correctly routed to skill__word_stats_demo. B39 W1 routed to skill__direct_llm instead. The word count/stats were computed but by a different skill. Possible cause: LLM sees direct_llm as a generic text-analysis tool and the explicit 'word_stats_demo' skill name doesn't provide enough differentiation signal in the description.

pre_conclusion_checklist.q1_observations_listed: 1 observation: B39 W1 S4 chose direct_llm; B38 W1 S4 chose word_stats_demo
pre_conclusion_checklist.q2_primary_or_inference: primary data — events log shows skill_run_spawned for direct_llm, artifacts dir has direct_llm artifact
pre_conclusion_checklist.q3_falsifying_data_checked: B38 W1 S4 was V (word_stats_demo used) — but different session context and action_usage.jsonl state
pre_conclusion_checklist.q4_infra_captures: events log + artifacts dir are primary data sources
pre_conclusion_checklist.q5_all_N_inspected: N=1 in B39 W1; cannot confirm pattern from single shot

new_findings.hypothesis: With hot-list seeded fresh (no bias toward word_stats_demo), LLM defaults to direct_llm for general text tasks. Needs cross-worker confirmation.

new_findings.title: S6 task_completed narration collapse: skill code output summarized instead of surfaced
new_findings.description: S6 turn 2: invoke_action(skill__direct_llm) ran successfully and produced Python code examples (squares, even_squares, nested). The [task_completed] message contained the code. But the agent's final reply narrated a summary ('コード例が提示されました') without surfacing the code. This violates the SPAWN-ACK/task_completed handling instruction ('narrate in 1-2 sentences, extract user-relevant fields'). The LLM collapsed concrete code output into a meta-description.

pre_conclusion_checklist.q1_observations_listed: 1 observation: agent reply contains no code, only description
pre_conclusion_checklist.q2_primary_or_inference: primary — history.jsonl shows agent text vs. task_completed message with actual code
pre_conclusion_checklist.q3_falsifying_data_checked: B38 W1 S6 used web__search path (synchronous, not spawn) — different execution path, not directly comparable
pre_conclusion_checklist.q5_all_N_inspected: N=1 in B39 W1 for spawn-path task_completed narration

new_findings.hypothesis: The spawn-path (invoke_action returning {status:spawned}) followed by [task_completed] injection creates a narration attractor where LLM summarizes rather than surfaces structured skill output. Distinct from synchronous tool-result path where LLM sees the content inline.

vs_b38.note: B38 W1 was V=4/I=0/R=3/B=0. B39 W1 is V=2/I=0/R=5/B=0. S4 V->R (routing regression to direct_llm), S6 V->R (task_completed narration collapse). S1/S2/S3/S5/S7 unchanged.
